chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يَنْبَغِي تَرْكُهُ لِلْمُحْرِمِ مِنَ الْجِدَالِ وَ غَيْرِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 82 – What is befitting for the one in Ihraam to neglect, from the arguing and such else

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/277)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/277)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ فِي الْجِدَالِ شَاةٌ وَ فِي السِّبَابِ وَ الْفُسُوقِ بَقَرَةٌ وَ الرَّفَثِ فَسَادُ الْحَجِّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Abu Al Magra, from Suleyman Bin Khalid who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Regarding the quarrelling is a sheep, and regarding the insults and the immoralities is a cow, and the copulation spoils the Hajj’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from abu al- Mighra’ from Sulayman ibn Khalid who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘The expiation for abusing and swearing is a cow and because of sexual relation al-Hajj becomes invalid.’”
